title: Blackboard Erasers
body: Mr. White is a teaching Chemistry class in Latimer Hall. His class has $$100$$ undergraduate staff (uGSIs, tutors, etc.). Mr. White learns that one of his staff is stealing blackboard erasers from his lecture hall when the building is closed overnight. The only way the thief could access the building overnight is with a key card that belongs to them. Suppose Mr. White discovers that $$10$$ of his staff have a key card.
